sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6816" key="a)nakroustiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακρου-στικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n6816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of reacting,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πληγή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.936f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
